title: Musical Ideas
content:
Musical Ideas

Ideas for Next Music Project

-Score in Sibelius
-Found Percussion
-Sketch out entire track with percussion first
-Use only samples as backbones of tracks
-learn new theory for each song
-minimal
-pick 5 instruments
-no midi, resample all sounds
-ever section needs something new in order for it to come back
-use a full field sample for each song

map out a 30 min song first with un edited samples that will frame the whole piece, then add percussion that is all sample based (this will further structure the piece)—then begin writing melodies and lyrics at the same time.

an application that allows for a user to play songs in sections—something like a personal ableton for each track—a user can listen to an intro for 10 mins then the chorus for 3 secs within the same song.

we just thought that was how you did it, just plug the gear in and see what comes out rather than playing a song, we thought it would be more fun to store a ton of patterns and then manipulate the gear to create the arrangement on the spot - Autchre
